labels.name: Name
labels.emptyChat: Type a message to start a conversation.

chat.connectionFailed: LLM server connection failed — Mock response mode. Please check if llama-server is running.
chat.sttModelLoading: Downloading speech recognition model... This may take a while on first use.
chat.visionNotSupportedMessage: The model {model} does not support image processing. Only text will be sent.
chat.imageAttached: Attached images: {files} (not processed — current model does not support vision)
chat.timeoutMessage: The model did not respond within 90 seconds. Please try again.
chat.fileOnlyPrompt: Please analyze the attached files and summarize the key points.
chat.noModelSelectedMessage: Please select a model before sending a message.
chat.modelTypeChatDesc: Best for text generation, summarization, and Q&A.
chat.modelTypeVisionDesc: Supports image understanding and image-based Q&A.
chat.modelTypeEmbeddingDesc: Best for vector embeddings used in search and similarity.
chat.modelTypeMultimodalDesc: Can process text and images together.

settings.typographyDescription: Set font size and weight individually for each level
settings.previewUser: Hello! This is a user message.
settings.previewAssistant: Hi! This is an AI response preview.

agentType.title: Agent Type
agentType.orchestratorDesc: Top-level coordinator that routes user requests to the appropriate manager agents and assembles final responses.
agentType.managerDesc: Mid-level coordinator that decomposes tasks and delegates to worker or sub-manager agents. Supports recursive hierarchy.
agentType.workerDesc: Leaf-level executor that handles atomic, indivisible tasks. Can process up to 3 concurrent tasks.
agentType.profilerDesc: Post-chat analysis agent that hooks into LangChain save callbacks to analyze user preferences, psychology, and behavioral patterns.
agentType.supporterDesc: Utility agent providing web search, RAG retrieval, document parsing, API calls, and other tool-based operations.

rating.tooltip: Click when the AI response doesn't match your intent or is inaccurate. Higher score = more dissatisfied.
rating.dissatisfactionDef: Dissatisfaction score: A reverse score indicating how far the AI response deviated from user intent (0=satisfied, 100=completely dissatisfied). This is NOT a positive star rating.
